message:
🐛 Remove hardcoded isDemoData from llm-d Benchmarks dashboard (#923)

The isDemoData prop was hardcoded to true, causing Stats Overview to
always show "Demo" badge even though it displays real cluster data.
Individual benchmark cards handle their own demo state.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
